title: OpLan
description: Brings /op to Singleplayer and LAN worlds !
body:
# OpLan

## Description:
Wants to play with your friends, siblings or neighbours ? To play for fun or to build amazing projects ? There is as many reasons to open a server than to play Minecraft. But with hosting prices you might have noticed some mods allowing you to open your singleplayers worlds as servers with dedicated IP.

Those will though limits you over how you can manage players as the Owner/Host compared to a normal server..

This mod aims to fix this and gives you more power, first step beeing the Operator status.


## Features:
Makes two already existing commands available trough LAN and Singleplayer.
  - **/op <playername>**    |  Will give Operator Permissions to the given player.
  - **/deop <playername>**  |  Will retrieve Operator Permissions from the given player.

    _Requires OP Permissions to execute_


## Compatibility:
Should work with any mods. Message me for further requests.


## Original Mod:
> [Lan Operators (1.18.2-1.20.2)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lan-operators)
>> Made by [flooflez](https://modrinth.com/user/flooflez)

## About:
No port demands at the moment (versions or loader).\
Please feel free to report bugs/issues and suggestions on [Github](https://github.com/CDXX710/oplan-1.21_fabric).
